name: LiveKit Agents
pricing_notes: Framework open source; LiveKit Cloud: free tier; Growth $99/mo based on minutes

auth.notes: LIVEKIT_API_KEY + LIVEKIT_API_SECRET for LiveKit Cloud; self-hosted supported

performance.notes: Voice pipeline: TTFT ~500ms end-to-end (VAD → STT → LLM → TTS); WebRTC with OPUS codec

agent_readiness.notes: Real-time multimodal AI agents framework. WebRTC transport. Python worker pattern. Built-in plugins: Deepgram/Whisper STT, OpenAI/Anthropic LLM, ElevenLabs/Cartesia TTS. Multi-modal: voice + video. Function calling support.

gotchas: Full voice pipeline requires assembling 4+ service credentials (LiveKit + STT + LLM + TTS)
Worker model (each agent is a background process) adds ops complexity
Video support adds complexity if only voice is needed
Self-hosted LiveKit server requires infrastructure management
best_when: Building real-time voice + video AI agents (not just voice)
Need multimodal real-time pipelines (voice + screen share + video)
Teams wanting production-grade WebRTC infrastructure with AI overlay
Already using LiveKit for WebRTC infrastructure
avoid_when: Simple voice bot without video (Pipecat or Vapi simpler)
Teams needing fully managed no-ops solution
summary: LiveKit Agents is a real-time multimodal AI agent framework built on LiveKit's WebRTC infrastructure. Supports voice + video pipelines with pluggable STT/LLM/TTS components. Best for agents needing full multimodal real-time interaction (voice + video + screen sharing), not just voice. Production-grade WebRTC with auto-scaling via LiveKit Cloud.
